summary: Iteration 177 - Frontend-only testing of chat UI bug fixes. Verified: 1) 'Map' story bubble REMOVED - only 'Your note' appears, 2) Avatar cache-busting implemented in 3 locations (stories, conversation list, chat header), 3) Pro Lounge visibility correctly restricted to Pro/God roles only, 4) Backend message routing correctly sends admin-to-admin to PRIMARY (not Channel).
